name: Spaetzle
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, water, eggs, and salt in a large bowl. Beat until smooth.
2. Gradually add the bouillon to 6 cups boiling water, stirring constantly.
3. Using a spatula, press half of the batter through a large-holed colander into the boiling water.
4. Cook the spaetzle until they float to the top of the water. Remove with a slotted spoon and repeat with the remaining batter.
5. Toss the cooked spaetzle in butter and chopped parsley. Add parmesan cheese and toss again.
